title: Chikitu Vibe Lyrics Coolie
stanzas:
Hey! Navuraa Dei!
Sound-a yethu!
Devaa Vaaraan Dei!
Hey ..Kaelraa Dei!
Kelvi keattu usura vaangaadhe!

Hey! Enga vanaam kettukko!
Yelam oorum paathukko!
Hey thambi konjam thallikko!
Coolie vara sollikko!

Edhukku pechu? Ozhunga ukkaare!
Enakku pause-e kedayaadhe!
Enemy dhostu, evana irundhalum!
Moraikalaama? Saarthan mudichidalaama?

Hey! Navuraa Dei!
Sound-a yethu!
Devaa Vaaraan Dei!

tamilStanzas:
ஹேய்! நவுறா டேய்!
சவுண்ட்-அ ஏத்து!
தேவா ..வரான் டேய்!
கேள்றா டேய்!
கேள்வி கேட்டு உசுர வாங்காதே!

ஹேய்! எங்கவேனா கேட்டுக்கோ!
எல்லா ஊரும் பாத்துக்கோ!
ஹேய் தம்பி கொஞ்சம் தள்ளிக்கோ!
கூலி வர்றான் சொல்லிக்கோ!

எதுக்கு பேச்சு?
ஒழுங்கா உட்காரே!
எனக்கு pause- கிடையாதே!
Enemy தோஸ்து எவனா இருந்தாலும்!
முறைக்கலாமா ?
சார்தான் முடிச்சிடலாமா?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Chikitu Vibe?

The song captures the lively spirit of celebration and camaraderie, encouraging listeners to enjoy the moment and dance.

What is the plot context of the movie Coolie?

The movie revolves around the life of a coolie and his adventures, showcasing themes of friendship and resilience.

Who is the singer of Chikitu Vibe?

The song is sung by the talented Anirudh, known for his catchy and energetic music.

When was Chikitu Vibe released?

The song was published on July 8, 2025.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chikitu Vibe, the vibrant energy of Anirudh's voice brings to life a celebration of joy and togetherness. The song is set against the backdrop of the movie Coolie, where it serves as a lively anthem for parties and gatherings. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, it encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. The upbeat mood and danceable rhythm evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect addition to any celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Chikitu Vibe from the upcoming Coolie, where Anirudh's electrifying beats set the perfect stage for an unforgettable dance experience. This track is a celebration of energy and rhythm, making it a must-listen for party lovers. Don't miss out on this vibrant collaboration that promises to get everyone on their feet!
stanzaMeanings: Hey! Everyone! What is the sound? God is coming! Hey.. Listen! Don't ask too many questions!
Hey! Listen to our voice! Look at the whole town! Hey brother, just push a little! Let them know the Coolie is coming!
Why talk? Just stay quiet! I can't take a pause! Enemy friend, no matter who it is! Can we finish it? Can we complete it?
Hey! Everyone! What is the sound? God is coming!
Chikitu Chikitu Chikitu cha Chikitu Chikitu Chikitu cha Chikitu Chikitu Chikitu cha Chikitu Chikitu Chikitu cha
Don't be a nuisance! Don't show your attitude! Don't be bad. Don't show your face...
I won't let the rule I set go! You can't just take it in your hands! Stop crying... Ah, it's done, come on...
